body:
## Rationale

**Priority: 🟡 MEDIUM — proven GA4 format, high-TAM names not covered in batches 1-6**

Igor Cavalera lick pages are **top-2 GA4 pages** after homepage + /drummers. Batches 1-6 covered: Igor ✓, Matt Greiner + Joey Jordison ✓, Gene Hoglan + Dave Lombardo + Tomas Haake ✓, Flo Mounier + Inferno + Jaska ✓, Lars Ulrich + Danny Carey + Brann Dailor ✓, Eloy Casagrande + George Kollias + Paul Mazurkiewicz (#2424 open).

**Batch 7 subjects (3 per drummer × 3 drummers = 9 lick pages):**

### 1. Jay Weinberg (3 licks)
- **Highest TAM in this batch** — replaced Joey Jordison in Slipknot 2013-2023, performed at Knotfest/Download/Rock am Ring
- Distinct style: hyperfast double-bass with dynamic range, nu-metal groove meets modern metal precision
- Lick ideas: "Psychosocial main groove" | "The Devil in I double-bass pattern" | "Unsainted verse groove"
- Search queries: "jay weinberg drum lick", "slipknot drum tutorial"

### 2. Nicko McBrain (3 licks)
- **GA4 signal confirmed** (#8 page view last period, 5 users)
- Iron Maiden's drummer since 1982, NWOBHM icon, distinctive syncopation style
- Lick ideas: "Aces High gallop pattern" | "Hallowed Be Thy Name tom run" | "Run to the Hills double-bass opener"
- Search queries: "nicko mcbrain drum lick", "iron maiden drum tutorial"

### 3. Pete Sandoval (3 licks)
- **50% GSC CTR** (blast beat pioneer, Morbid Angel, Terrorizer)
- Invented many foundational death metal blast beat patterns
- Lick ideas: "Blessed Are the Sick blast burst" | "Altars of Madness gravity blast" | "Where the Slime Live drum fill"
- Search queries: "pete sandoval blast beat", "morbid angel drum tutorial"

## Template / Data shape

Each lick follows the existing lickData pattern from batches 1-4:
```js
{
  slug: '[drummer]-[lick-name]',
  drummer: '[Drummer]',
  band: '[Band]',
  title: '[Lick Title]',
  description: '...',
  technique: '[technique type]',
  bpm: ...,
  youtubeId: '...',  // optional
  transcript: '...',
  faq: [{ q: '...', a: '...' }],  // ≥3 Q&A
  relatedLicks: [...],
}
```

## LLM files

For each drummer, create a batch LLM companion:
- `/public/llms/licks/jay-weinberg-licks.md`
- `/public/llms/licks/nicko-mcbrain-licks.md`
- `/public/llms/licks/pete-sandoval-licks.md`

## Files to touch

- Lick data file (wherever batches 1-4 were added — check codebase)
- `/public/llms/licks/jay-weinberg-licks.md`
- `/public/llms/licks/nicko-mcbrain-licks.md`
- `/public/llms/licks/pete-sandoval-licks.md`
- Sitemap update for 9 new lick URLs

## Expected page count

9 new lick pages + 3 LLM files

## Quality gate

- ≥150 words per lick page
- ≥3 FAQ Q&A per lick
- ≥3 internal links per lick (to drummer profile + album articles + related licks)
- Article JSON-LD schema
- LLM companion per drummer

## Estimated organic uplift

Igor lick pages = top GA4 pages. Same format, new drummers. Jay Weinberg: ex-Slipknot audience (millions of fans actively searching). Nicko: GA4-confirmed organic. Pete Sandoval: 50% CTR blast beat queries = exact search intent match. Serves GSC bucket: technique/tutorial queries.

## Verify

1. 9 new lick pages reachable under `/drummers/[drummer]/licks/[slug]`
2. All 3 LLM files under `public/llms/licks/`
3. Sitemap includes all 9 new URLs
4. Article schema on each lick page
5. Cross-links from drummer profiles to new lick pages

## Done

- [ ] 9 lick data entries added
- [ ] 3 LLM files created
- [ ] Sitemap updated
title: SEO batch: Lick pages batch 7 — Jay Weinberg + Nicko McBrain + Pete Sandoval (~9 lick pages + 3 LLM files)
